The Alzheimer's Association is pleased to announce the launch of the new Microbial Alzheimer's Data Sets Center.  The Center will provide a central location for the exchange of information and data between the research community and the Alzheimer's Association.  The Center will be managed by the Center's Research Group, led by Dr. John C. White, Ph.D., Director of the Center.  The Center will be located at the Alzheimer's Association's headquarters in Washington, D.C.  The Center will be open to the public and will be staffed by a number of researchers and staff from the Center's Research Group.

Klay,

prompt: until very recently, that handling payments was exclusively handled by
generation:
until very recently, that handling payments was exclusively handled by the 
credit card companies. 

The credit card companies have been very cooperative in allowing us to use 
their systems to process payments.  However, we have had some problems with 
the credit card companies in the past.  We have had to pay a $1,000 fee to the 
credit card companies to process payments.  We have also had to pay a $1,000 
fees to the credit card companies to process credit card transactions.  

We are working with the credit card companies to resolve these issues.  We are 
also working with the credit card companies to resolve the issue of the 
credit card companies not allowing us to process payments for the EnronOnline 
accounts.  We are working with the credit card companies to resolve this issue as well.  

We will keep you posted as we learn more.

Thanks,

Kay
